target.title: fix: reload config in slash command routing so dmScope is respected
target.body:
Fixes #39605

## Summary

Refresh native-command routing from the active runtime config after config hot writes.

- Discord command dispatch now uses the current runtime snapshot.
- Discord autocomplete authorization, route/model context, and dynamic choices use the same current snapshot.
- Slack slash-command dispatch now uses the current runtime snapshot.
- Telegram is unchanged because current `main` already refreshes native-command config per invocation and has regression coverage for command routing changes without bot recreation.

The original PR targeted the old core channel paths. This refresh moves the fix to the current Discord and Slack plugin-owned implementations.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command.plugin-dispatch.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command.options.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/slash.test.ts`
  - Discord: 34 tests passed
  - Slack: 38 tests passed
- targeted extension oxlint passed
- targeted oxfmt check passed
- `git diff --check`
- fresh maintainer autoreview: no accepted/actionable findings
- Testbox changed-lane gate: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27504943356 (`tbx_01kv3f518tht4vrqr0wc6yzv8j`)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord and Slack native commands could keep routing to the startup session after `session.dmScope` or related runtime routing config changed.

Real environment tested: Current OpenClaw checkout on Node plus Linux Testbox changed-lane validation.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the focused Discord and Slack command tests above. Each regression registers the command once, invokes it with the startup snapshot, activates a new source/runtime snapshot pair, and invokes the same registered command again.

Evidence after fix: Discord `/status` changes from the main session to the direct-message session; Discord autocomplete changes authorization and dynamic choices from the refreshed config; Slack dispatch changes `CommandTargetSessionKey` to the refreshed direct-message route. All 72 focused tests passed.

Observed result after fix: Native command routing and Discord autocomplete use the active runtime snapshot without recreating the provider command registration.

What was not tested: No external Discord or Slack workspace was mutated during verification.
